content:
# Session 320 ‚ÄĒ review of iter-320

## Metadata
- Iteration: 320. Two prover lanes, both GREEN builds, both PARTIAL (no full close).
- Sorry counts: **FBC** (`Cohomology/CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean`) 5 ‚Üí 5 (structurally advanced + 1 new sorry-free thm); **PTC** (`Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/PullbackTensorComp.lean`) 1 ‚Üí 1 (bare sorry ‚Üí partial proof Steps A‚ÄďD + residual sorry).
- Net honest sorry delta: 0. Structural delta: +1 sorry-free theorem (`coverInterOpen_isAffine`); FBC twisted `app` sorry eliminated‚Üíre-isolated as the precise named leaf `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma`.

## PTC ‚ÄĒ `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (PARTIAL)
The 4-square interleaved assembly paste. Developed in `Scratch_PTC.lean` (import prebuilt TOS olean, ~26 s/iter; LSP dead, real builds ~9 min), transplanted, confirmed by a full green `lake env lean` (exit 0).
- **Landed (Steps A‚ÄďD):** A = `rw [sheafificationCompPullback_comp ‚Ä¶]` (Sq1 expand) + 2 `congr_arg‚āā (¬∑‚Čę¬∑) rfl` peels; B = `erw [pullbackComp_őī ‚Ä¶]` (Sq2b őī-rewrite); C = `rw [‚Üź Functor.map_comp_assoc]; erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_app, Functor.map_id, Category.id_comp]` (PpbC.hom‚ąėinv cancel); D = `rw [Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_őī, Functor.map_comp]` (comp_őī split).
- **Wall (genuine, env-level):** the whole lemma now carries `backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` (forced by Step A's Sq1 rewrite: `Scheme.Modules.pullback ‚Čü SheafOfModules.pullback (toRingCatSheafHom ¬∑)` defeq) + `maxHeartbeats 3200000`. The `sheafificationCompPullback` naturality slide (`hnatőī`, which typechecks cheaply) **times out at 6.4M heartbeats / ~9 min** when rewritten into the giant goal ‚ÄĒ the whole-goal `rw`/`slice_lhs` MOTIVE explodes under relaxed transparency (kabstract defeq over the enormous tail). 3 variants tried (erw naturality_assoc; explicit `have hnatőī`+`rw`; `slice_lhs 1 2 => rw`), all the same wall.
- **S3 private-lemma wall:** `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`/`_hom_eq` are `private` in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` ‚áí inaccessible from PTC; goal shows `sheafifyTensorUnitIso‚úĚ` (dagger). Workaround = `change`-through-defeq to `a.map(ő∑ ‚Ė∑ Q) ‚Čę a.map((a.obj P).val ‚óĀ ő∑)`; cleaner fix = un-`private` it.

## FBC ‚ÄĒ 02KH leaf wiring (PARTIAL √ó2 + 1 NEW sorry-free thm)
- **`coverInterOpen_isAffine` (NEW, sorry-free, axiom-clean).** Finite nonempty ńĆech intersection opens of separated `f` (S affine, affine cover) are affine: `IsAffine S ‚áí IsSeparated (terminal.from X)` (via `terminal.comp_from` + `IsSeparated.comp_iff.mpr ‚ÄĻIsSeparated f‚Äļ`) ‚áí closed-immersion diagonal (`IsSeparated.isClosedImmersion_diagonal`) ‚áí `IsAffineOpen.iInf (isAffineOpen_opensRange ‚Ä¶)`. Auditor confirmed genuine, not laundered. **NOTE: uses `iInf`, not `biInf`** ‚ÄĒ blueprint hint `lem:isAffineOpen_biInf_mathlib` mismatches.
- **`twisted_cech_nerve_iso` (PARTIAL).** STEP 1 sig-ext: explicit base-changed-cover binders `[Finite (‚Ä¶pushforwardIso‚Ä¶).I‚āÄ]` + `[‚ąÄ i, IsAffine (‚Ä¶ .X i)]` (TC won't unfold `pushforwardIso`/`Cover.copy`/`openCoverOfLeft` to reduce `ūĚíį'.I‚āÄ ‚Č° ūĚíį.I‚āÄ`), propagated up the chain. STEP 2a: monolithic `exact sorry` in `app` ‚Üí genuine reassembly `Pi.mapIso (fun ŌÉ => twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma ‚Ä¶) ‚Č™‚Čę (pushPull_sigma_iso ‚Ä¶).symm`; content re-isolated into NEW typed-sorry leaf `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma` (per-ŌÉ X-level Beck‚ÄďChevalley + cover-base-change identity `coverInterOpen ūĚíį' ŌÉ = (g')‚ĀĽ¬Ļ(coverInterOpen ūĚíį ŌÉ)`).
- **`pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (PARTIAL).** Added `(hF : F.IsQuasicoherent)` + `[Finite őļ][Nonempty őļ]`; **threaded `hF`** through `cech_pushforward_baseChange_natIso ‚Üí cechComplex_baseChange_cosimplicialIso ‚Üí cechComplex_baseChange_iso ‚Üí cech_flatBaseChange` (required architecture: altitude-2 bridge `pushPullObj_pushforward_iso_tilde` needs `F` quasi-coherent). Body establishes `hV : IsAffineOpen (coverInterOpen ūĚíį ŌÉ)` then `sorry`. Residual = affine-reduction heart (present f/g/g'/f' over V as Spec.maps, route LHS through the altitude-2 bridge, extract affine pushout square via `CommRingCat.isPushout_iff_isPushout` from the restricted cartesian square, discharge to `cech_degree_affine_baseChange`).
- **Two naturalities (L552 natIso, L652 twisted)** NOT attempted ‚ÄĒ gated on the per-ŌÉ leaves being concrete (the naturality square factors through their naturality).
- **`pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (L159)** untouched ‚ÄĒ leaf-1 flat-left-exact wall, deferred (separate lane).

## Subagent findings (all NON-gating; no must-fix)
- **lean-auditor** (`lean-auditor-iter320.md`): 0 crit / 2 major / 3 minor. No laundering, no weakened signatures, no axioms, all open sorries genuinely open. **2 MAJOR = stale .lean comments**: `cechComplex_baseChange_iso` docstring (L692) "STUB ‚ÄĒ depends on the still-open `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`" is factually WRONG (the post-iter-315 chain routes through `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange`‚Üí`twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma`‚Üí`affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange`, NOT `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`); the USER comment (L693‚Äď698) directing a prover to close `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` FIRST is outdated/misdirecting. Review can't edit `.lean` ‚Üí flag for next FBC prover.
- **lvb fbc-320** (`lean-vs-blueprint-checker-fbc-320.md`): 2 major / 4 minor, no must-fix. The 2 NEW leaves lack `\lean{}` blocks (`coverInterOpen_isAffine`, `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma`); `coverInterOpen_isAffine` only obliquely referenced via `lem:isAffineOpen_biInf_mathlib` (biInf‚Č†iInf). Signature drift (hF, instance binders) = minor prose lag. Under-specified: per-ŌÉ RHS `g'^*` tilde-bridge + the two naturalities.
- **lvb ptc-320** (`lean-vs-blueprint-checker-ptc-320.md`): 1 major / 1 minor, no must-fix. Chapter faithful; iter-319 backwards Sq4-chain display now FIXED (forward-oriented). MAJOR: master lemma's Sq3 prose + `\uses` don't connect `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` to the S3 step, and the blueprint omits it is `private` to TOS.lean (can't be cited by name ‚Üí forces a `change`-defeq). No `\lean{}`/signature mismatch.

## Key patterns discovered
- **Small-motive discipline for giant-term assembly.** Under `respectTransparency false`, a `rw`/`slice_lhs` of even a cheaply-typechecked naturality `have` whnf-explodes if its motive abstracts the giant goal tail. Fix = extract each slide as a standalone small-goal lemma + compose via `calc`/`Eq.trans` that never abstracts the tail. (Banked; D3‚Ä≤ assembly residual.)
- **Separated ‚áí affine intersection opens.** `IsAffine S` + `IsSeparated f` ‚áí `IsSeparated (terminal.from X)` ‚áí closed-immersion diagonal ‚áí `IsAffineHom` ‚áí `IsAffineOpen.iInf`. Clean reusable route (`coverInterOpen_isAffine`).
- **hF must be threaded for the altitude-2 tilde bridge.** Quasi-coherence is load-bearing all the way down the 02KH base-change chain; the bridge `pushPullObj_pushforward_iso_tilde` is unusable without it.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. The two new Lean decls (`coverInterOpen_isAffine`, `twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma`) have NO blueprint block yet ‚ÄĒ authoring informal prose is the planner's job (flagged in recommendations.md, not authored here). No `\mathlibok` applies (both are project decls, neither a Mathlib re-export). No `\notready` to strip; no `\lean{}` rename.

## sync_leanok
- `sync_leanok-state.json`: iter 320, sha a3c77096, +1/‚ąí0 on `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex`. Current for this tree.

## Blueprint doctor
- Broken cross-refs persist in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2) and `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (12) ‚ÄĒ pre-existing off-front backlog (QuotScheme/GlueDescent lanes not active). No orphan chapters. No new axioms. Not gating; recorded for the planner.

## Recommendations
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: both lanes effort-break per the planner's own reversal signals (PTC = per-slide small-motive decomposition + un-private `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`; FBC = effort-break `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` affine-reduction heart). Fix the 2 stale FBC `.lean` comments (next prover). Author the 2 missing blueprint blocks + fix the biInf/iInf hint.
